title: GitHub Advanced Security Part 2 of 2
summary: Learn how to secure your code with advanced security features at every stage of your development lifecycle. GitHub Advanced Security is an add-on to GitHub Enterprise that allows you to use security features, such as secret scanning, code scanning, and dependency management on your private repositories. This is the second learning path out of two learning paths of GHAS.

sections.title: GitHub Advanced Security Part 2 of 2
sections.summary: Learn how to secure your code with advanced security features at every stage of your development lifecycle. GitHub Advanced Security is an add-on to GitHub Enterprise that allows you to use security features, such as secret scanning, code scanning, and dependency management on your private repositories. This is the second learning path out of two learning paths of GHAS.

lessons.title: Identify security vulnerabilities in your codebase by using CodeQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use CodeQL to analyze the code in your GitHub repository and identify security vulnerabilities.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/codebase-representation-codeql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Identify security vulnerabilities in your codebase by using CodeQL

lessons.title: Code scanning with GitHub CodeQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use CodeQL, a powerful static analysis tool, to implement code scanning on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/code-scanning-with-github-codeql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: GitHub administration for GitHub Advanced Security
lessons.content_md:
Understand where GitHub Advanced Security fits in your software development lifecycle and how to enable and roll it out in your organization.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-administration-github-advanced-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: GitHub administration for GitHub Advanced Security

lessons.title: Manage sensitive data and security policies within GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Familiarize yourself with GitHub's basic security tools, which prepare repositories for secure development and industry-standard response to threats.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-sensitive-data-security-policies/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage sensitive data and security policies within GitHub

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica GitHub Advanced Security Part 2 of 2
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **GitHub Advanced Security Part 2 of 2**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
